title: AgentCounsel Hub Legal Data Source Registry
description: Schema for public legal data, guidance, template, and agency source records used by AgentCounsel Hub.

homepageUrl.description: Canonical public homepage or landing page.

apiUrl.description: Optional API endpoint or documentation URL.

accessMethod.description: How the source should be accessed, such as api, web, bulk_download, or api_or_bulk_download.

recommendedUse.description: Conservative use guidance, such as store_metadata_first, link_and_summarize, or manual_review_required.

attributionRequired.description: Whether attribution should be assumed required.

canStoreFullText.description: Whether full text storage is allowed, or a verification note.

canRedistribute.description: Whether redistribution is allowed, or a verification note.

notes.description: Human review notes about provenance, use, and caution areas.
